items.checkin_comment: Enjoying this while backing donkeys on Adelaide Cup Day

beer.beer_style: IPA - Imperial / Double New England / Hazy

items.badge_description: We’re excited to unveil our annual badge in honor of International Women’s Day, shining a light on the amazing contributions of women and non-binary individuals within the craft beer scene and celebrating their creativity, passion, and dedication. Let’s raise our glasses to the pioneers who have forged a path for the next wave of female, femme-identifying, and non-binary brewers. Join the conversation on Instagram!

You may not be able to see through the haze, but that juicy, hoppy goodness goes down smooth. What started as a trend is here to stay. That's 450 different beers with the style of IPA - New England / Hazy, Pale Ale - New England / Hazy, IPA - Milkshake, or Pale Ale - Milkshake. Try 5 more for Level 91!

items.badge_description: When a single isn’t enough, make it a double. Doubling the hops and malts in a recipe results in a higher ABV and can pack quite a boozey punch. That's 405 different beers with the style that contains Imperial / Double in its style name. Try 5 more for Level 82!
